title: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has released the official notification for 1 Associate Project Scientist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Associate Project Scientist: Master's degree in Chemistry with a minimum of three years of experience in the synthesis of polymers or organic molecules.

salary_details.details: Pay: Rs. 37000 HRA: Rs. 5920 Medical: Yes Total Amount: Rs. 44170 per month for 03 months.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via E-mail about the mode of interview. Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Associate Project Scientist position at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Associate Project Scientist position at IIT Guwahati is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Associate Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Master's degree in Chemistry. Additionally, candidates must possess at least three years of relevant experience in the synthesis of polymers or organic molecules.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Associate Project Scientist post at IIT Guwahati as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Associate Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a total monthly amount of Rs. 44170, which includes a pay of Rs. 37000, HRA of Rs. 5920, and medical benefits. This is for a duration of 03 months.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Interested and eligible candidates need to apply through the official recruitment portal of IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Associate Project Scientist position is scheduled for 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement for any specific age criteria or relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job. The initial duration for the Associate Project Scientist role is 03 months.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITG/II&SI/Project Staff Rectt-2026/114.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of IIT Guwahati for more details.
